bird.name: Cebu boobook
bird.summary: The Cebu boobook or Cebu hawk-owl (Ninox rumseyi) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. It is endemic to the Philippines.

relations.subject: Cebu boobook
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through slash-and-burn and urbanization
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Cebu boobook
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through slash-and-burn and urbanization
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Cebu boobook
relations.evidence: The forests of Cebu continue to undergo hunting pressure and deforestation — further reducing what little there is remaining
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
